commands.command: python -m build_color.cli difference ff6030 ff7040 --metric all

telos_measurement_bridge.measurement_layers_summary: Telos measurement layers report 10 layers, 10 measurements, status MATCH.
telos_measurement_bridge.display_calibration_summary: Telos display calibration contract is read-only, with 3 targets, 4 patch sets, 5 artifact types, and hardware mutation disabled.

boundary: This is a software-side color science and measurement demo.
It does not use a physical colorimeter, mutate display state, install an ICC profile, or claim physical calibration accuracy.
It is suitable as a public measurement proof lane only when those boundaries remain visible.
